name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-27
title: Step 4 TEST-WRITE commits tests before TEST-RED verifies them
description: Step 4 TEST-WRITE in the assembled prompt (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py lines 364-370) commits new/updated tests immediately after writing them. Step 5 TEST-RED then runs the tests and verifies failure. If the tests inadvertently pass (no red), the bad tests are already committed to the branch. TDD discipline requires the red verification BEFORE the commit. Either swap the order (run tests first, then commit only on red), or document this as an explicit deviation. The current flow allows broken tests to enter the repo.
